screen.walkietalkie.title: Walkie Talkie
activation.walkietalkie.name: Walkie Talkie
source_line.walkietalkie.name: Walkie Talkie
config.walkietalkie.voice_default.toolti: New players get the Walkie Talkie's activation set to Voice instead of Push-to-Talk, so holding the item is the only button you need. Turn this off to manage it yourself in PV's Activation settings.
config.walkietalkie.sfx_volume.tooltip: Volume of the power on/off and talk start/stop click sounds.
